title: Definitely Under Observation
objective: Survive a 2-4 minute cardiac stress test by swiping through incoming hazards, passing periodic cardiologist inspections, and cashing out a growing score multiplier before your heart meter flatlines.

controls.outcome: Move the patient across three treadmill lanes to avoid incoming hazards.

controls.input: Swipe into a flashing red lane during a Definitely scan
controls.outcome: Charge the score multiplier faster, but spawn speed and hazard density increase until the scan ends.

controls.input: Hold your lane during a green monitor pulse
controls.outcome: Bank the current multiplier and recover a small amount of heart meter if you stayed clean through the pulse.

steps: Start on a monitored treadmill with a low heartbeat and a x1 multiplier.
Dodge incoming hazards such as falling energy drinks, flying stair steps, panic alerts, and rolling office chairs.
Every few seconds, the cardiologist triggers a big "DEFINITELY?" scan that marks one lane green and one lane red.
Staying in the green lane safely banks your multiplier; cutting through the red lane during the scan spikes your multiplier but also speeds,
waves, and audio tempo for the next few seconds.
A hit removes heart meter; a second hit during an unbanked risky streak causes an immediate flatline fail state.
Last as long as possible, post the final score to a simple local leaderboard, and chase a higher best run offline.
scoring: Score rises from survival time, near-miss dodges, and scan decisions. Each hazard avoided during an unbanked red-lane "Definitely" streak increases the multiplier, but the multiplier is only secured when the next green-p
tips: Use short swipes; overcorrecting into the red lane is the main way runs end.
Treat each Definitely scan as a decision point: cash out safely or push for one more boosted wave.
Audio matters: the faster heartbeat loop warns that risky streak speed is peaking.

trendContext.title: His Cardiologist was definitely watching him
